title: Under 5 minutes to a deployed LLM endpoint — Audry Hsu, RunPod
summary: RunPod is a serverless LLM deployment platform enabling developers to deploy model endpoints on H100 GPUs in under five minutes with pay-per-request pricing. The platform grew from spare crypto mining hardware in 2022 to 500,000 developers and $120 million annual recurring revenue.
writeup: This talk from RunPod's Audry Hsu walks through deploying an LLM endpoint on RunPod's serverless GPU platform in under five minutes. RunPod, founded in 2022, runs inference on infrastructure like H100s with pay-per-request, usage-based pricing rather than persistent provisioning. The company reports $120 million in annual recurring revenue and 500,000 developers, framing serverless GPU inference as the deployment path the platform is built around.
